The latest announcement is out from Aker Solutions ASA ( (GB:0QXP) ).

Aker Solutions ASA has issued a correction to a previous stock exchange notice regarding a share sale by executive vice president for People & Transformation, Kjetil Kristiansen. The company clarified that Kristiansen sold 35,276 shares in the company on December 4, 2025, at NOK 31.20 per share, and that he now holds 14,117 shares, with the updated disclosure made in line with EU market abuse regulations and Norwegian securities law.

The most recent analyst rating on (GB:0QXP) stock is a Hold with a NOK33.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Aker Solutions ASA stock, see the GB:0QXP Stock Forecast page.

More about Aker Solutions ASA

Aker Solutions ASA is a global provider of integrated solutions, products and services to the energy industry, focusing on enabling low-carbon oil and gas production while developing renewable energy solutions. The company leverages digital technologies and predictable project execution to support the transition to sustainable energy production and employs around 11,800 people in more than 15 countries.

data.title: Rumble Resources Reshapes Finance Leadership Amid Focus on Wilmac Copper-Gold Project
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

The latest announcement is out from Rumble Resources, Inc. ( (TSE:RB) ).

Rumble Resources Inc. announced the resignation of Erwin Wong from his roles as Chief Financial Officer, Corporate Secretary and director as he departs to pursue other business interests. The company has moved quickly to maintain continuity by appointing existing board member Christopher Paterson as the new Chief Financial Officer and Secretary, a change that stabilizes leadership as Rumble advances its optioned Wilmac Copper-Gold Project in British Columbia, a key asset underpinning its growth strategy in the regional copper-gold exploration space.

More about Rumble Resources, Inc.

Rumble Resources Inc. is a mineral exploration and development company focused on the identification, acquisition, exploration and development of mineral resource projects. The company holds an exclusive option to acquire a 70% interest in the Wilmac Copper-Gold Project in south-central British Columbia, located southwest of Princeton and near Hudbay Mineral Inc.’s producing Copper Mountain Mine, although it has no interest in or rights to adjacent properties.

Average Trading Volume: 22,171

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Learn more about RB stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Cambi Secures THP Lease Deal with Thames Water to Boost Oxford Treatment Capacity
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Cambi ASA ( (DE:3W7) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Cambi ASA has signed a small-value lease contract, estimated at the lower end of NOK 15–50 million, to supply a compact thermal hydrolysis process unit to the Oxford sewage treatment works, operated by Thames Water. The one-year lease, with options for two one-year extensions, will increase local sludge treatment capacity by more than 50%, allowing Thames Water to treat all solids on site rather than transporting them elsewhere, and includes annual maintenance plus installation and commissioning supervision ahead of an expected 2026 start-up. The deal deepens Cambi’s three-decade relationship with the UK’s largest water and wastewater utility, reinforces the company’s flexible leasing-based delivery model for meeting urgent capacity needs, and further embeds its THP technology in the UK market, where Thames Water already runs Cambi systems at seven locations.

More about Cambi ASA

Cambi ASA is a global supplier of biogas technology and solutions for wastewater treatment plants and anaerobic digestion facilities, with a core focus on thermal hydrolysis process (THP) systems that boost renewable energy generation, cut operational costs, and reduce greenhouse gas emissions from biosolids treatment. Founded in 1992, the company has maintained market leadership through patented technologies and a strong project delivery track record, delivering installations in 28 countries across six continents and serving a range of biosolids outlets, while being listed on Euronext Growth Oslo.

YTD Price Performance: 9.45%

Average Trading Volume: 38,952

Current Market Cap: NOK2.87B

See more data about 3W7 stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.description:

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions

The latest announcement is out from Fuller Smith & Turner ( (GB:FSTA) ).

Fuller, Smith & Turner has repurchased 4,347 of its 40p “A” Ordinary Shares on the London Stock Exchange as part of the share buyback programme launched in August 2025, paying an average price of 729.38p per share and intending to hold the stock in treasury. Following this transaction, the company’s listed issued share capital stands at 36,391,365 “A” Ordinary Shares, of which 4,511,688 are held in treasury, leaving 31,879,677 voting rights in circulation, a figure shareholders must now use when calculating disclosure thresholds under FCA transparency rules.

The most recent analyst rating on (GB:FSTA) stock is a Buy with a £847.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Fuller Smith & Turner stock, see the GB:FSTA Stock Forecast page.

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, GB:FSTA is a Outperform.

Fuller Smith & Turner demonstrates strong technical momentum and positive corporate actions, which are the most significant factors driving the score. Financial performance is solid, though improvements in free cash flow and return on equity could enhance the outlook. Valuation is fair, providing a balanced risk-reward profile.

To see Spark’s full report on GB:FSTA stock, click here.

More about Fuller Smith & Turner

Fuller, Smith & Turner P.L.C., commonly known as Fuller’s, is a UK-based brewer and pub operator whose “A” Ordinary Shares are listed on the London Stock Exchange, giving it access to public equity markets to support its hospitality-focused operations.

data.title: Chalet Hotels Receives Promoter Group Reclassification Requests
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Chalet Hotels Ltd. ( (IN:CHALET) ) has provided an update.

Chalet Hotels Limited has disclosed that it has received requests from Sundew Real Estate Private Limited and Pramaan Properties Private Limited, both currently classified as part of its promoter group but holding no shares in the company, to be reclassified as public shareholders. The company stated that these reclassification requests, made under Regulation 31A of SEBI’s Listing Regulations, will be placed before its Board of Directors at an upcoming meeting, signaling a formal step in refining its shareholding classification and corporate governance disclosures for investors and regulators.

More about Chalet Hotels Ltd.

Chalet Hotels Limited operates in the hospitality and real estate sector, developing and managing hotels and mixed-use properties. The company focuses on upscale and luxury hospitality assets, with its registered office in Mumbai and its securities listed on both the National Stock Exchange of India and BSE, including equity shares, non-convertible debentures, and commercial paper.

Average Trading Volume: 33,013

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: 192.1B INR

NatWest Group ( (GB:NWG) ) has issued an update.

NatWest Group has continued its existing share buyback programme by repurchasing 826,992 ordinary shares on 19 January 2026 from Merrill Lynch International on the London Stock Exchange, at a volume-weighted average price of 643.14 pence per share. The bank plans to cancel the repurchased shares, which will leave 219,454,919 ordinary shares held in treasury and 7,996,052,333 shares in issue (excluding treasury), a move that marginally reduces the company’s outstanding share count and can be supportive of earnings per share and capital return to shareholders.

data.title: Domestic Metals Taps CRD Expert Peter Megaw to Advance Montana Copper-Gold Project
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Domestic Metals ( (TSE:DMCU) ) has provided an update.

Domestic Metals has appointed renowned Carbon Replacement Deposit specialist Dr. Peter Megaw as a technical advisor to guide exploration at its Smart Creek Copper Porphyry Project in Montana, leveraging his decades of experience and discovery record in silver and gold systems. The move follows recent high-grade surface sampling results at Smart Creek and is accompanied by stepped-up investor outreach through a webinar and conference appearances, underscoring the company’s bid to advance the project and strengthen its position in the North American copper-gold exploration space.

More about Domestic Metals

Domestic Metals Corp. is a Vancouver-based mineral exploration company focused on discovering large-scale copper and gold deposits in historically productive mining districts across the Americas. Its flagship Smart Creek Project in Montana lies in a mining-friendly jurisdiction and hosts widespread surface copper mineralization with multiple porphyry copper, epithermal gold, replacement and exotic copper targets, supported by an experienced management and technical team with a track record in discovery, development and financing.

YTD Price Performance: -1.54%

Average Trading Volume: 122,930

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

An update from SmartCraft ASA Class A ( (DE:9YK) ) is now available.

SmartCraft ASA has continued to execute its share buy-back programme, repurchasing 55,238 shares between 9 and 19 January 2026 at an average price of NOK 25.4436 per share, for a total consideration of approximately NOK 1.4 million. Including previously disclosed transactions, the company has now acquired 1,002,580 shares under the programme for a total of NOK 24.75 million, moving further towards its authorised NOK 35 million limit and signalling ongoing capital management efforts that may support shareholder value and adjust the company’s capital structure.

More about SmartCraft ASA Class A

data.title: GMV Minerals Hires Machai Capital to Drive Digital Investor Outreach and Grants New Stock Options
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

An update from GMV Minerals ( (TSE:GMV) ) is now available.

GMV Minerals has engaged Machai Capital Inc., a data-driven investor awareness and digital marketing firm, to lead a five-month comprehensive digital media campaign aimed at boosting the company’s brand visibility and investor outreach across multiple online platforms. The agreement, which includes a C$300,000 cash payment from working capital and stock options for 300,000 common shares at $0.25, is subject to TSX Venture Exchange approval and is complemented by a broader incentive stock option grant of 2,475,000 options to directors, officers and consultants, aligning stakeholders with the company’s growth plans at its Mexican Hat gold project, where a strong 2025 PEA underscores significant economic potential.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:GMV) stock is a Hold with a C$0.28 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on GMV Minerals stock, see the TSE:GMV Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on TSE:GMV Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, TSE:GMV is a Neutral.

The score is primarily held down by weak financial performance (no revenue, ongoing losses, and persistent cash burn), partially offset by a debt-free balance sheet. Technical indicators are moderately supportive with price trading above key moving averages and positive momentum, but valuation support is limited given the negative P/E and no dividend yield.

To see Spark’s full report on TSE:GMV stock, click here.

More about GMV Minerals

GMV Minerals Inc. is a publicly traded mineral exploration company focused on developing precious metal assets in Arizona. Through a wholly owned subsidiary, it holds a 100% interest in the Mexican Hat gold property in Cochise County, a former Placer Dome exploration project. The company is advancing the project toward near-term gold production, supported by an NI 43-101 inferred resource of 36.7 million tonnes grading 0.58 g/t gold for 688,000 ounces, and a recently filed Preliminary Economic Assessment outlining a 10-year, heap-leach operation with robust projected returns at current and higher gold prices.

Average Trading Volume: 352,751

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: C$25.46M
